    • sendNow

      public int sendNow()

    • saveToQueue

      public int saveToQueue()

    • saveToQueue

      public int saveToQueue(String from, String fromName, String subject, String content, Map<String,String> tos, Map<String,String> ccs, Map<String,String> atts)
      保存到队列
      参数:
      from - 发件人
      fromName - 发件人姓名
      subject - 邮件标题
      content - 正文
      tos - 收件人(email, name)
      ccs - 抄送人(email, name)
      atts - 附件(name, path)
      返回:
      messageId
